---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
  <div class="hcc-contact-page">
  <div class="hcc-contact-copy">
    <h2>Contact</h2>
    <p class="hcc-contact-lead">Feel free to reach out with any questions, comments, or inquiries about research and collaboration opportunities.</p>
    <p class="contact-inline">
      <a class="contact-icon" href="mailto:yulia@hai-lights.co" aria-label="Email">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="mailto:yulia@hai-lights.co">yulia@hai-lights.co</a>
    </p>
    <p class="contact-inline">
      <a class="contact-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuliatyukhova/" target="_blank" aria-label="LinkedIn">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuliatyukhova/" target="_blank">https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuliatyukhova/</a>
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="hcc-contact-form-panel">
    <form class="hcc-contact-form" name="contact" method="POST" data-netlify="true" netlify-honeypot="bot-field">
      <h3 class="hcc-contact-form-title">Send a Message</h3>
      <p class="hcc-visually-hidden">
        <label>Don't fill this out if you're human: <input name="bot-field" /></label>
      </p>
      <label for="contact-name">Name</label>
      <input id="contact-name" type="text" name="name" autocomplete="name" placeholder="Your name" required />
      <label for="contact-email">Email</label>
      <input id="contact-email" type="email" name="email" autocomplete="email" placeholder="your@email.com" required />
      <label for="contact-message">Message</label>
      <textarea id="contact-message" name="message" rows="6" placeholder="Your message..." required></textarea>
      <button class="hcc-button" type="submit">Send message</button>
    </form>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-logo-wrap">
    <img class="contact-logo" src="images/hai-lights-contact-logo-transparent.png" alt="Hai-lights logo" />
  </div>
</div>
```
